name: Ambient Temperature
validSet: A valid temperature within the constraints of the format.
picture: +9(n).9(n)No delimiters, no leading zeros, right justified

name: Code
description: A unique handle for an occurrence of an entity.  The handle is unique within the market. A typical code will be associated with an entity which is functional in nature rather than a kernel or transactional entity; occurrences are typically low and may be associated with effective dates.
notes: Nominal Sub Type:                      Picture:                               Logical Format:String                                           a(n)                                      CHAR(n)Integer                                         9(n)                                      INT(n)

name: Consumer Energy
description: A quantity of energy or integrated power.  The nominal units are either Watt-Hours (Wh) or Volt-Amp-Reactive-Hours (VArh) as specified by the associated Measurement Quantity.  The unit multiplier (kilo = 1000) reflects market preference for describing small energy values, for example those associated with an individual metering system.
notes: This domain is effectively a Sub Type of a fuller domain describing all possible Energy.The definition can be qualified or overridden to reflect:- Unit Multiplier:   kilo = 1,000 (kWh, kVArh);                           No other alternatives are allowed;- Null value:        Allowed;                           Not allowed;- Default value    Required;                           Not required;- Justification       Left;                           Centre;                           Right;- Leading Zeroes: Yes;                           No;- Delimiters:         Thousand;                           None.

name: Date
description: A calendar date.  Dates are local with respect to the geographical area in which the market operates unless otherwise stated.
validSet: A valid date in the calendar period 1950-2199.

name: DateTime
description: A calendar date and time.  DateTimes are local with respect to the geographical area in which the market operates unless otherwise stated.
validSet: A valid time within a valid date in the calendar period 1950-2199.

name: Effective Date
description: A date from which or to which any associated data is valid.  Effective dates are inclusive.  Dates are local with respect to the geographical area in which the market operates unless otherwise stated.
validSet: A valid date in the calendar period 1950-2199.

name: Identifier
description: A complete or partial handle for an occurrence of an entity.A typical identifier will be associated with either a kernel or transactional entity rather than a functional entity; occurrences are typically medium to large and may be archived after a retention period.
notes: Nominal Sub Type:              Picture:               Logical Format:Integer                                 9(n)                     INT(n)String                                   a(n)                     CHAR(n)

name: Integer
validSet: The default is positive, but can be negative if specified by the data item

name: Meter Value
description: A reading or advance for an electricity meter.  The units are specific to the type of meter.

name: Monetary
picture: +9(n).9(n)No delimiters, no leading zeros; signed, right justified.

name: Real
picture: +9(n).9(n)No delimiters, no leading zeros, right justified

name: Run Number
description: A unique handle for the execution of a component of an application system.  A component may be any single process (e.g. a program), collection of processes (e.g. a batch job or suite of jobs) or the application system itself.  Execution is from initial invocation of the component to termination, for whatever reason. The handle is unique within the component.
notes: Run numbers must be allocated in sequence for audit purposes, starting with 1.Run numbers may include a check digit.  Typically this is derived by applying an algorithm to the other digits and can be used to facilitate validation.

name: Short Description
description: A freeform character string used for short textual descriptions, names or labels.  Typically this is associated with an identifier. Also refer to String, Text.
validSet: Any alpha, numeric and some special characters where alpha characters are in the standard English language set, and special characters belong to the character set supported by the data transfer medium used.
notes: The definition can be qualified or overridden to reflect:- Characters allowed: Alpha; Numeric; Alphanumeric; Special; Any;- Language set: English; No other sets are allowed;- Spaces allowed: Allowed; Not allowed (i.e. continuous);- Filled: Filled; Not filled;- Case allowed: Upper; Lower; Mixed;- Null value: Allowed; Not allowed;- Default value: Required; Not required;- Justification: Always left.

name: String
description: A set of continuous, alphanumeric characters. Typically this is used for codes and identifiers.
validSet: Any alpha and/or numeric characters where alpha characters are in the standard English language set, and also special characters belonging to the character set supported by the data transfer medium used.
notes: This domain is a subset of 'text', however the valid set for 'string' and 'text' is identical.

name: Text
validSet: Any alpha, numeric and special characters where alpha characters are in the standard English language set, and special characters belong to the character set supported by the data transfer medium used.

name: Time
description: A calendar time in an unstated calendar day.  Times are local with respect to the geographical area in which the market operates unless otherwise stated.
validSet: A valid time within a valid date in the calendar period 1950-2199.

name: Timestamp
description: A high resolution, local calendar time in calendar day.  Timestamps are local with respect to the geographical area in which the market operates unless otherwise stated.  Timestamp is usually generated by the system and used for creating a unique audit point.
validSet: A valid time within a valid date in the calendar period 1950-2199.

name: Wholesale Energy
description: A quantity of energy.  The unit multiplier (Mega = 1,000,000) reflects market preference for describing large energy values, for example those associated with aggregated values for settlement.
